response.justification: Candidate has broad full-stack experience across many languages (TypeScript, Node.js, DLang, Java, C#) but lacks the core mandatory requirement: 5-10 years of hands-on C++ development on Windows. C++ exposure is limited to a ~6-month stint at National Instruments in 2014-2015 and a bachelor thesis project. No SQL Server/Oracle experience is shown, and there is no fixed income, capital markets, or investment banking domain background.
strengths: Strong engineering fundamentals with TDD, CI/CD, and software craftsmanship practices
Polyglot background including some C/C++ exposure at National Instruments
Solid communication skills evidenced by workshops, talks, and teaching engagements
concerns: Insufficient C++ experience (only ~6 months) versus the required 5-10 years on Windows
No SQL Server or Oracle experience; SQL background appears limited to MySQL/MongoDB
Zero fixed income, capital markets, or investment banking domain exposure

key_factors.factor: Capital markets / fixed income domain knowledge
